resources.string: SeriesGuide will receive no more updates for this version of Android.

string.name: action_check
string.comment: Action when an error is displayed the user should check upon.

resources.string: Connect to the internet, then try again
No app available to handle this
Try to export your data, re-install and restore
Could not talk to %s. Try again later.
Show not migrated to TMDB data. Some actions incl. Trakt and Cloud sync might not work. Maybe search for a replacement and delete this show. Tap to view details.
Can not create a calendar event
Your comment does not follow the rules!
Comment not deleted, it is too old or has replies
No details in %1$s available, consider adding them at %2$s. Or try to change the language.
Some details are hidden to prevent spoilers. To turn this off go to Settings.
Set all episodes up to here watched?
Could not delete show. Try again later.
Make all hidden shows (%s) visible again?
Nothing going on. Watch some shows!
Nothing going on. Watch some movies!
To update connect to the internet
An update is in progress, try again later
Not found in your show list
The show does not exist (yet) on TMDB. Try again later.
All shows will appear in your show list shortly
%s will appear in your show list shortly
%s is already in your show list
You can add shows to this list
A list with this name already exists
You have not added movies to your collection
You have not added movies to your watchlist
Movie removed from TMDB. Remove it from lists, set it not watched. Using Trakt? On their website, search for its TMDB ID and remove it from history and lists.
SeriesGuide Cloud helps to back up and sync your shows, lists and movies
While signed in with SeriesGuide Cloud, some Trakt features are disabled and changes are only sent to your Trakt account, not retrieved.
Setting up SeriesGuide Cloud was not completed
Your account does not have an email address
This will delete your shows, lists and movies from SeriesGuide Cloud
Choose email to sign in if you are using SeriesGuide on other devices that do not support Google sign-in.
You are already checked in. Override the check-in or wait %s and try again.
Your Trakt account is locked. Contact Trakt support.
Something went wrong. Check your Trakt credentials and try again.
Not (yet) available on Trakt. Try again later.
Can not (yet) be tracked with Trakt
Can\'t add, Trakt account limit reached.
Can\'t upload, Trakt account limit reached.
To use this, connect to Trakt
Trakt is a third-party service that helps keep a record of what TV shows and movies you are watching.
What Trakt calls library is called collection in SeriesGuide.
Once connected, add shows from your Trakt account using the Trakt items on the Discover tab.
Do not ask for a check in message
Special episodes disappear from everywhere except season list
Hide details until an episode is watched
To reduce data charges, don\'t download over mobile or metered networks
This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
This app uses data and images by Trakt.
SeriesGuide is built using open source software.

string.name: clear_cache_summary
string.comment: Description of a link to Android system settings for the app that explains how to clear the cache of the app

resources.string: Go to Storage settings to clear cache of images and server data
Can not find or access file
Your current shows, lists or movies will be replaced by the imported data
Not recommended when using SeriesGuide Cloud or Trakt
Syncing with Cloud or Trakt may overwrite imported data. With SeriesGuide Cloud, you can delete your account before importing data, then re-create it afterwards to only upload the imported data.
Weekly backup of your shows, lists and movies to device storage.
These backups are deleted if the app is uninstalled. You can choose to create copies in another location below that can be restored using the import tool.

string.name: autobackup_failed
string.comment: Brief error message shown for auto backup

resources.string: The last auto backup has failed

string.name: autobackup_files_missing
string.comment: Brief error message shown for auto backup

resources.string: A file to store the copy of an auto-backup is missing
Create a copy after each backup
An auto backup might be available to restore from.
Configure if and how notifications appear
Also vibrate on displaying a notification
Even if notifications are enabled, do not notify about hidden shows
Only for episodes to watch next
Only notify if the new episode is the next one to watch
Go to Battery settings to disable battery optimizations for reliable notifications
To receive episode and error notifications, go to Settings and allow them
To receive notifications on time, go to Settings and allow setting reminders
Note that the number of items is always limited to save resources
Try for 30 days, cancel any time.
Every subscription unlocks all features and supports future updates. A subscription is not required to use this app.
Thanks for supporting SeriesGuide! You have access to all features.

string.name: billing_unlock_detected
string.comment: Detailed message shown if all features are unlocked by the (legacy) in-app purchase or the unlock app.

resources.string: All Access Pass detected. You may still subscribe to support future updates.

string.name: subscription_expired_details
string.comment: Brief message shown if there is an issue with the subscription (e.g. it has expired) or the unlock app was uninstalled.

resources.string: The subscription is currently not available
X Pass is currently not available
Tell me how to improve it?

string.name: fui_progress_dialog_loading
string.translation_description: Loading text in dialog

string.name: fui_sign_in_default
string.translation_description: Button text to sign in

string.name: fui_continue
string.translation_description: Button text to continue

string.name: fui_tos_and_pp
string.translation_description: Global ToS and privacy policy message

resources.string: By continuing, you are indicating that you accept our %1$s and %2$s.

string.name: fui_tos_and_pp_footer
string.translation_description: Global ToS and Privacy policy footer

string.name: fui_no_internet
string.translation_descripition: User message shown when sign-in is attempted while offline.

resources.string: Network error, check your internet connection.

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_google
string.translation_description: Sign in button text

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_facebook
string.translation_description: Sign in button text

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_twitter
string.translation_description: Sign in button text

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_github
string.translation_description: Sign in button text

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_email
string.translation_description: Sign in button text

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_phone
string.translation_description: Sign in button text

string.name: fui_sign_in_anonymously
string.translation_description: Continue as guest

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_apple
string.translation_description: Sign in button text. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_microsoft
string.translation_description: Sign in button text. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_yahoo
string.translation_description: Sign in button text. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

string.name: fui_continue_with_google
string.translation_description: Continue button text

string.name: fui_continue_with_facebook
string.translation_description: Continue button text

string.name: fui_continue_with_twitter
string.translation_description: Continue button text

string.name: fui_continue_with_github
string.translation_description: Continue button text

string.name: fui_continue_with_email
string.translation_description: Continue button text

string.name: fui_continue_with_phone
string.translation_description: Continue button text

string.name: fui_continue_with_apple
string.translation_description: Continue button text. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

string.name: fui_continue_with_microsoft
string.translation_description: Continue button text. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

string.name: fui_continue_with_yahoo
string.translation_description: Continue button text. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

string.name: fui_signed_in_as
string.translation_description: Message showing who is signed in.

string.name: fui_manage_mfa_action
string.translation_description: Action label for managing multi-factor authentication.

string.name: fui_sign_out_action
string.translation_description: Action label for signing out.

string.name: fui_verify_email_instruction
string.translation_description: Instruction asking the user to verify their email.

string.name: fui_send_verification_email_action
string.translation_description: Action label for resending a verification email.

string.name: fui_verified_email_action
string.translation_description: Action label once the user has verified their email.

string.name: fui_profile_completion_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when profile completion is required.

resources.string: Please complete your profile information to continue.

string.name: fui_profile_missing_fields_message
string.translation_description: Message enumerating missing profile fields.

string.name: fui_skip_action
string.translation_description: Generic action for skipping an optional step.

string.name: fui_remove_action
string.translation_description: Generic remove action label.

string.name: fui_back_action
string.translation_description: Generic back action label.

string.name: fui_verify_action
string.translation_description: Generic verify action label.

string.name: fui_use_different_method_action
string.translation_description: Action prompting the user to select a different MFA method.

string.name: fui_recovery_codes_saved_action
string.translation_description: Action confirming recovery codes have been saved.

string.name: fui_secret_key_label
string.translation_description: Label for a secret key value.

string.name: fui_verification_code_label
string.translation_description: Label for verification code input fields.

string.name: fui_identity_verified_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when identity verification succeeds.

resources.string: Identity verified. Please try your action again.

string.name: fui_mfa_manage_factors_title
string.translation_description: Title for the manage MFA screen.

string.name: fui_mfa_manage_factors_description
string.translation_description: Helper description for managing MFA methods.

resources.string: Add or remove authentication methods for your account

string.name: fui_mfa_active_methods_title
string.translation_description: Title for the list of enrolled factors.

string.name: fui_mfa_add_new_method_title
string.translation_description: Title for the list of available factors to enroll.

string.name: fui_mfa_all_methods_enrolled_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when all available factors are already enrolled.

resources.string: All available authentication methods are enrolled

string.name: fui_mfa_label_sms_authentication
string.translation_description: Label for the SMS MFA factor.

string.name: fui_mfa_label_totp_authentication
string.translation_description: Label for the authenticator app MFA factor.

string.name: fui_mfa_label_unknown_method
string.translation_description: Label for an unknown MFA factor.

string.name: fui_mfa_enrolled_on
string.translation_description: Label indicating the enrollment date of an MFA factor.

string.name: fui_mfa_setup_authenticator_description
string.translation_description: Description displayed during authenticator app setup.

resources.string: Scan the QR code or enter the secret key in your authenticator app

string.name: fui_mfa_choose_method_instruction
string.translation_description: Instruction to choose an MFA verification method.

string.name: fui_mfa_enrollment_instruction
string.translation_description: Instruction to enroll in MFA.

resources.string: Add an extra layer of security

string.name: fui_mfa_method_sms
string.translation_description: Label for SMS MFA method.

string.name: fui_mfa_method_totp
string.translation_description: Label for authenticator app MFA method.

string.name: fui_mfa_phone_number_already_exists_error
string.translation_description: Error when phone number is already associated with another account.

resources.string: This phone number is associated with another account

string.name: fui_mfa_second_factor_required_error
string.translation_description: Error when second factor verification is required.

string.name: fui_mfa_setup_instruction
string.translation_description: Instruction for setting up authenticator app.

resources.string: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app

string.name: fui_mfa_totp_already_exists_error
string.translation_description: Error when authenticator app is already set up.

resources.string: Authenticator app is already set up

string.name: fui_mfa_unenrollment_confirmation_message
string.translation_description: Confirmation message before removing an MFA method.

resources.string: Are you sure you want to remove this method?

string.name: fui_mfa_unenrollment_error
string.translation_description: Error when unable to remove MFA method.

string.name: fui_mfa_unenrollment_success_message
string.translation_description: Success message after removing MFA method.

string.name: fui_mfa_verification_instruction
string.translation_description: Instruction to enter verification code.

string.name: fui_reauth_dialog_title
string.translation_description: Title for the re-authentication dialog.

string.name: fui_reauth_dialog_message
string.translation_description: Message shown in the re-authentication dialog.

resources.string: For your security, please re-enter your password to continue.

string.name: fui_reauth_account_label
string.translation_description: Label indicating the email account being re-authenticated.

string.name: fui_incorrect_password_error
string.translation_description: Error shown when the provided password is incorrect.

string.name: fui_reauth_generic_error
string.translation_description: Generic error shown when re-authentication fails.

string.name: fui_reauth_instruction
string.translation_description: Instruction to confirm identity to continue.

string.name: fui_reauth_required_error
string.translation_description: Error when re-authentication is required.

string.name: fui_reauth_success_message
string.translation_description: Success message after re-authentication.

string.name: fui_reauthenticate_action
string.translation_description: Action to re-authenticate.

string.name: fui_profile_update_error
string.translation_description: Error when unable to update profile.

string.name: fui_profile_update_success_message
string.translation_description: Success message after profile update.

string.name: fui_next_default
string.translation_description: Button text to continue

string.name: fui_email_hint
string.translation_description: Hint in email input field

string.name: fui_phone_hint
string.translation_description: Hint for phone input field

string.name: fui_country_hint
string.translation_description: Hint for phone input field

string.name: fui_country_selector_title
string.translation_description: Country selector modal title

string.name: fui_search_country_field_hint
string.translation_description: Hint for search for country input field

string.name: fui_password_hint
string.translation_description: Hint for password input field for existing passwords

string.name: fui_confirm_password_hint
string.translation_description: Hint for confirm password input field for existing passwords

string.name: fui_new_password_hint
string.translation_description: Hint for password input field for new passwords

string.name: fui_required_field
string.translation_description: Inline error for required field

string.name: fui_invalid_email_address
string.translation_description: Inline error for invalid email address

string.name: fui_missing_email_address
string.translation_description: Inline error for empty email address in input field

resources.string: Enter your email address to continue

string.name: fui_missing_first_and_last_name
string.translation_description: Inline error for empty email address in input field. [CHAR_LIMIT=60]

resources.string: Please enter a first and last name.

string.name: fui_progress_dialog_checking_accounts
string.translation_description: Progress dialog text while checking for existing accounts

string.name: fui_title_register_email
string.translation_description: Title for signup form

string.name: fui_name_hint
string.translation_description: Hint for last name input field

string.name: fui_button_text_save
string.translation_description: Button text to save input form

string.name: fui_progress_dialog_signing_up
string.translation_description: Dialog text while waiting for server's signup response

plurals.name: fui_error_weak_password
plurals.item: Password not strong enough. Use at least %1$d character and a mix of letters and numbers
Password not strong enough. Use at least %1$d characters and a mix of letters and numbers

string.name: fui_email_alreay_in_use
string.translation_description: Inline error for signup failure

resources.string: This email address is already in use by an existing account. Please sign in with your existing account.

string.name: fui_terms_of_service
string.translation_description: Link text to web url containing the app's terms of service

string.name: fui_privacy_policy
string.translation_description: Link text to web url containing the app's privacy policy

string.name: fui_welcome_back_idp_header
string.translation_description: Inline subtitle to users whose signup was interrupted since an existing account was detected

string.name: fui_welcome_back_email_header
string.translation_description: Message for returning users

string.name: fui_welcome_back_email_link_header
string.translation_description: Message for returning users

string.name: fui_welcome_back_idp_prompt
string.translation_description: Message to users that need to signin using existing IDP accounts

resources.string: You\'ve already used %1$s. Sign in with %2$s to continue.

string.name: fui_welcome_back_password_prompt_body
string.translation_description: Message to users that need to signin using existing email accounts

resources.string: You\'ve already used %1$s to sign in. Enter your password for that account.

string.name: fui_welcome_back_email_link_prompt_body
string.translation_description: Message to users that need to signin using existing email link accounts

resources.string: You\'ve already used %1$s. You can connect your %2$s account with %1$s by signing in with email link below.\n\nFor this flow to successfully connect your %2$s account with this email, you have to open the link on the same device or browser.

string.name: fui_progress_dialog_signing_in
string.translation_description: Progress dialog text

string.name: fui_trouble_signing_in
string.translation_description: Link leading to forgot password flow

string.name: fui_title_recover_password_activity
string.translation_description: Recover password screen title

string.name: fui_title_confirm_recover_password
string.translation_description: Password recovery confirmation message

string.name: fui_password_recovery_body
string.translation_description: Password recovery message body

resources.string: Get instructions sent to this email that explain how to reset your password.

string.name: fui_button_text_send
string.translation_description: Button text to send recovery email

string.name: fui_confirm_recovery_body
string.translation_description: Alert dialog displayed after password recovery email is sent

resources.string: Follow the instructions sent to %1$s to recover your password.

string.name: fui_progress_dialog_sending
string.translation_description: Progress dialog while password recovery email or email link is being sent

string.name: fui_error_email_does_not_exist
string.translation_description: Inline error when user attempt signin with invalid account

resources.string: That email address doesn\'t match an existing account

string.name: fui_error_unknown
string.translation_description: General error messages for an unknown failure.

string.name: fui_error_invalid_password
string.translation_description: Error message for when the user enters an invalid or wrong password.

string.name: fui_passwords_do_not_match
string.translation_description: Error message when password don't match

string.name: fui_error_password_too_short
string.translation_description: Error message when password is too short

resources.string: Password must be at least %1$d characters long

string.name: fui_error_password_missing_uppercase
string.translation_description: Error message when password is missing uppercase letter

resources.string: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

string.name: fui_error_password_missing_lowercase
string.translation_description: Error message when password is missing lowercase letter

resources.string: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

string.name: fui_error_password_missing_digit
string.translation_description: Error message when password is missing digit

resources.string: Password must contain at least one number

string.name: fui_error_password_missing_special_character
string.translation_description: Error message when password is missing special character

resources.string: Password must contain at least one special character

string.name: fui_accessibility_logo
string.translation_description: Content description for app logo

string.name: fui_or_continue_with
string.translation_description: Divider text for alternate sign-in options

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_email_link
string.translation_description: Button text to sign in with email link

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_password
string.translation_description: Button text to sign in with password

string.name: fui_email_link_header
string.translation_description: Email link sign in email sent header

string.name: fui_email_link_email_sent
string.translation_description: Text to tell the user that the email has been sent

resources.string: A sign-in email with additional instructions was sent to %1$s. Check your email to complete sign-in.

string.name: fui_email_link_trouble_getting_email_header
string.translation_description: Header that is displayed on the trouble signing in activity

string.name: fui_email_link_trouble_getting_possible_fixes
string.translation_description: A list of possible fixes for receiving the email

resources.string:
Try these common fixes:
• Check if the email was marked as spam or filtered.
• Check your internet connection.
• Check that you did not misspell your email.
• Check that your inbox space is not running out or other inbox setting related issues.

string.name: fui_email_link_resend
string.translation_description: Button text to resend

string.name: fui_email_link_wrong_device_header
string.translation_description: Header shown when the user opens a link that was sent from a different device

string.name: fui_email_link_wrong_device_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when the user opens a link that was sent from a different device

resources.string: Try opening the link using the same device or browser where you started the sign-in process.

string.name: fui_email_link_invalid_link_header
string.translation_description: Header shown when the user opens a link that was sent from a different device

string.name: fui_email_link_invalid_link_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when the user opens a link that was sent from a different device

resources.string: The action code is invalid. This can happen if the code is malformed, expired, or has already been used.

string.name: fui_email_link_different_anonymous_user_header
string.translation_description: Header shown when the user opens a link but the underlying session has changed

string.name: fui_email_link_different_anonymous_user_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when the user opens a link but the underlying session has changed

resources.string: The session associated with this sign-in request has either expired or was cleared.

string.name: fui_email_link_confirm_email_header
string.translation_description: Header shown when prompting the user to confirm their email to complete the sign in

string.name: fui_email_link_confirm_email_message
string.translation_description: Message shown when prompting the user to confirm their email to finish the sign in flow

resources.string: Confirm email to continue sign in

string.name: fui_email_link_dismiss_button
string.translation_description: Dismiss button for the wrong device or invalid link dialog

string.name: fui_email_link_cross_device_linking_text
string.translation_description: Text shown when the user opens an email link on a different device, but they had originally intended to link a provider to their account.

resources.string: You originally intended to connect %1$s to your email account but have opened the link on a different device where you are not signed in.\n\nIf you still want to connect your %1$s account, open the link on the same device where you started sign-in. Otherwise, tap Continue to sign-in on this device.

string.name: fui_verify_phone_number_title
string.translation_description: Phone number entry form title

string.name: fui_invalid_phone_number
string.translation_description: Inline error when phone number entered is invalid

string.name: fui_enter_confirmation_code
string.translation_description: Phone number verification code entry form title

resources.string: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to

string.name: fui_resend_code_in
string.translation_description: Countdown timer text that the user needs to wait for before attempting to resend verification sms

string.name: fui_verify_your_phone_title
string.translation_description: Button text to complete phone number verification

string.name: fui_verifying
string.translation_description: Progress dialog text while phone number is being verified

string.name: fui_incorrect_code_dialog_body
string.translation_description: Inline error when incorrect sms verification code is being used to verify

string.name: fui_error_too_many_attempts
string.translation_description: Error message when the phone number has been used too many times

resources.string: This phone number has been used too many times

string.name: fui_error_quota_exceeded
string.translation_description: Error message when the Firebase project's quota has been exceeded.

resources.string: There was a problem verifying your phone number

string.name: fui_error_session_expired
string.translation_description: Error message when SMS confirmation code has expired.

resources.string: This code is no longer valid

string.name: fui_sign_in_with_phone_number
string.translation_description: Label for phone number input form

string.name: fui_auto_verified
string.translation_description: Popup informing the user that their phone number was automatically verified

string.name: fui_resend_code
string.translation_description: Link text to resend verification sms

string.name: fui_verify_phone_number
string.translation_description: Button text to submit confirmation code and complete phone verification

string.name: fui_change_phone_number
string.translation_description: Link text to change the phone number during verification

string.name: fui_sms_terms_of_service
string.translation_description: Fine print warning displayed below Verify Phone Number button

resources.string: By tapping "%1$s", an SMS may be sent. Message & data rates may apply.

string.name: fui_sms_terms_of_service_and_privacy_policy_extended
string.translation_description: Fine print warning displayed below Verify Phone Number button

resources.string: By tapping "%1$s", you are indicating that you accept our %2$s and %3$s. An SMS may be sent. Message & data rates may apply.

string.name: fui_error_dialog_title
string.translation_description: Title for error recovery dialog

string.name: fui_error_retry_action
string.translation_description: Retry button text in error dialog

string.name: fui_error_mfa_required_message
string.translation_description: Error message when MFA is required

resources.string: Additional verification required. Please complete multi-factor authentication.

string.name: fui_error_account_linking_required_message
string.translation_description: Error message when account linking is required

resources.string: Account needs to be linked. Please try a different sign-in method.

string.name: fui_error_auth_cancelled_message
string.translation_description: Error message when authentication is cancelled

resources.string: Authentication was cancelled. Please try again when ready.

string.name: fui_mfa_step_select_factor_title
string.translation_description: Title for MFA factor selection step

string.name: fui_mfa_step_configure_sms_title
string.translation_description: Title for SMS MFA configuration step

string.name: fui_mfa_step_configure_totp_title
string.translation_description: Title for TOTP MFA configuration step

string.name: fui_mfa_step_verify_factor_title
string.translation_description: Title for MFA verification step

string.name: fui_mfa_step_show_recovery_codes_title
string.translation_description: Title for recovery codes step

string.name: fui_mfa_step_select_factor_helper
string.translation_description: Helper text for selecting MFA factor

resources.string: Select a second authentication method to secure your account

string.name: fui_mfa_step_configure_sms_helper
string.translation_description: Helper text for SMS configuration

resources.string: Enter your phone number to receive verification codes

string.name: fui_mfa_step_configure_totp_helper
string.translation_description: Helper text for TOTP configuration

resources.string: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app

string.name: fui_mfa_step_verify_factor_sms_helper
string.translation_description: Helper text for SMS verification

resources.string: Enter the code sent to your phone

string.name: fui_mfa_step_verify_factor_totp_helper
string.translation_description: Helper text for TOTP verification

resources.string: Enter the code from your authenticator app

string.name: fui_mfa_step_verify_factor_generic_helper
string.translation_description: Generic helper text for factor verification

string.name: fui_mfa_step_show_recovery_codes_helper
string.translation_description: Helper text for recovery codes

resources.string: Store these codes in a safe place. You can use them to sign in if you lose access to your authentication method.

string.name: fui_mfa_enrollment_enter_phone_number
string.translation_description: Title for MFA phone number enrollment screen (top app bar)

string.name: fui_mfa_enrollment_verify_sms_code
string.translation_description: Title for MFA SMS verification screen (top app bar)

string.name: fui_mfa_error_recent_login_required
string.translation_description: Error message when MFA enrollment requires recent authentication

resources.string: This operation requires recent authentication. Please sign in again and try again.

string.name: fui_mfa_error_invalid_verification_code
string.translation_description: Error message when MFA enrollment fails due to invalid verification code

resources.string: The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.

string.name: fui_mfa_error_network
string.translation_description: Error message when MFA enrollment fails due to network issues

resources.string: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.

string.name: fui_mfa_error_generic
string.translation_description: Generic error message for MFA enrollment failures

resources.string: An error occurred during enrollment. Please try again.

string.name: fui_new_accounts_disabled_tooltip
string.translation_description: Tooltip shown when sign-up button is disabled because new accounts are not allowed

resources.string: This button is currently disabled because new accounts are not allowed

string.name: fui_mfa_disabled_tooltip
string.translation_description: Tooltip shown when manage MFA button is disabled because MFA is not enabled
